subject: Urban watch: kangaroos and koalas positioning around Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-3389
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of poodle work in Canberra. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Nikola Tesla. Reference initiative INIT-3389. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: review, delivery.
